nasb.text: “And I will bring you out of the midst of the city and deliver you into the hands of strangers and execute judgments against you.

esv.text: And I will bring you out of the midst of it, and give you into the hands of foreigners, and execute judgments upon you.

cnv.text: 我要把你們從城中趕出去，交在外族人的手裡；我要向你們施行審判。

ccb.text: 我必把你们从城中赶出去，交给外族人。我必惩罚你们，
